modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request for reimbursement of personally purchased IT equipment.

full_description_text:  
User bought an iPad with their personal credit card for work purposes.  
They are now looking for guidance on how to get reimbursed for this purchase.  
Additionally, they mentioned a CNC machine motion controller in their request.  
This indicates they may have multiple reimbursement needs related to personally purchased hardware.
